title: RHtech
description: RHtech is a technical Minecraft modpack with a magical touch.
body:
## Welcome to RHtech
A technical modpack that brings a new dimension of engineering, automation and technical challenges to the game. We've put together this modpack with a careful selection of technical mods that allow players to explore a world of advanced machinery, automation and innovative industry. But that's not all! **RHtech** is also subtly complemented by several magical mods that add a bit of mystery and magic to the game. Maximize your skills in technology and discover magical powers at the same time.

And that's not all! **RHtech** also offers its own dedicated server for players who want to connect and share their adventures with others. Together you can build, innovate and compete in a world full of technical challenges. We also have a community Discord server where you can connect with other players, get tips and advice, and become part of our growing Minecraft community.

Get ready for an adventure where you'll build, create and discover to reach the pinnacle of technical skill in Minecraft. **RHtech** is for those who seek challenges and want to dive into the world of advanced technology and magic - join and start your journey to technical excellence


## News
- Currently we are working on re-numbering of modpack to better represent curent state of development.
- In 1.16.5-6.0.3 (earlier 1.0.3) was discovered duplication glitch, we are working on removal of that.
- In 1.16.5-6.0.3 (earlier 1.0.3) mod Electrodynamics is buggy on server, this mod will be removed.


**[Disocrd Server](https://discord.gg/TfPFT5F8ex)** - Check the modpack's Discord for a great community server ;-)

<details>
<summary>More information</summary>
  
- Modpack will be for now published in variant for 1.16.5  
- Soon we will add original variant for 1.12.2 in version 5, early versions will apear in future.  
- Major versions of modpack are complete rework and may occur once or twice a year.  
- Mods are listed in changelog for each version.  
- Any problems, bugs or questions report to our discord server.  

</details>
